app.title: Parametric Disaster Payout Demo
app.tagline: Insurance demo flow through the Vercel BFF

banner.notice: This service is a demo for demand research and does not underwrite policies or make real payments.

home.title: Keep Rails hidden while the demo payout flow runs in the browser.
home.description: The browser always talks to the Vercel domain, and Next.js Route Handlers relay API traffic to Rails.
home.featureA: Persistent strip with the demo notice
home.featureC: Session cookie issued on the Next.js side

login.title: Send a Google ID token to the BFF to start a session.
login.description: The browser posts only to the Vercel domain, and Next.js forwards the request safely to Rails.
login.idTokenPlaceholder: Paste the ID token from Google
login.hint: A successful sign-in sets a session cookie scoped to the Vercel domain.

new.pageDescription: Choose the plan, station, trigger threshold, payout tier, and then submit through the BFF.
new.title: Apply for a simulated policy
new.description: Pick options with mock-style cards, then turn on reCAPTCHA before submitting.
new.planHelp: Choose the plan type that matches the disaster trigger.
new.stationHelp: Select the observation point used to evaluate the trigger.
new.thresholdHelp: Select the threshold value that will be sent to Rails.
new.payoutHelp: Choose the simulated payout tier for this policy.
new.recaptchaHint: Turn this on to enable submission.

errors.duplicatePolicy: You already have an active policy for the same plan type.

mypage.title: My page
mypage.description: Review the latest simulated policy you applied for.
mypage.emptyState: No application has been saved yet. Create one from the wizard.
mypage.waitingExplanation: In this demo, a submitted policy is shown with the Pending status.
